title: Decadent Ukrainian Egg Yolks Dumplings
description: A flexitarian-friendly Ukrainian dish featuring egg yolks and fermented kimchi, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This molten, fermented dish is a unique twist on traditional Ukrainian cuisine.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and black pepper to combine.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and sour cream until smooth.
Add the kimchi to the egg yolk mixture and stir to combine.
Gradually add the flour mixture to the egg yolk mixture, stirring until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 6 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a tablespoon of butter in the center of each.
Fold the dough over the butter to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill.
